0.text: Mass in the right upper lobe's posterior segment, measuring 11.5 cm in craniocaudal dimension and 9 cm in transverse diameter

3.text: Areas of ground glass opacities and consolidation adjacent to the mass

4.text: Subsegmental area of atelectasis in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

5.text: Mild emphysematous changes in both lungs

6.text: Stable parenchymal nodules in both lungs
